caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a green t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" speaks into a black professional microphone. He is in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with several framed photos on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt to his right. Clothing racks are visible in the background. On the screen, there are logos in the bottom corners; one on the left says "P1" and one on the right says "DREELY TOT". Across the sequence, the man maintains his position while speaking, gesturing with his right hand in the second frame before returning it to a neutral position. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, moving from a neutral look to a more active expression of speaking.
